memberdef.argsstring: (geometry_msgs::msg::Pose pose_in, geometry_msgs::msg::Pose &pose_out, const std::string &from_frame, const std::string &to_frame)
memberdef.name: transformBetweenFrames

detaileddescription.para: Populates the results array with the values of the setpoint number boxes. Ordered xyzrpw

briefdescription.para: invoked when the interactive setpoint marker is moved
